one_line: Synthesized safety rules on 12 simple incidents (cascade labels unseen, leakage-clean) and evaluated on 20 cascade incidents: cross-type transfer gap 0.078 (TRAIN simple acc 0.923 -> HELDOUT cascade acc 0.845), cascade false-allow rate 0.066 vs hand-written oracle 0.208; the general treats_forbidden_category->block rule transfers, target-specific trap_action hazards are the ceiling; operator routed to gpt-5.5 since Anthropic out of credits.
